summary: Applied .filter(v => v.is_primary) to the veterinarians mapping in buildEmergencyCard (public.ts line 142). The public emergency card endpoint now returns only the primary vet instead of all vets. If no vet has is_primary === true the array is empty, which is correct per the spec. EmergencyCardPreview.tsx was inspected and requires no change — it does not render a vet list at all; it renders conditions, allergies, medications, vaccinations, alerts, and one emergency contact.
notes_for_reviewer: EmergencyCardPreview.tsx has no vet display logic — no change was needed there.
The buildEmergencyCard function is shared by both the /card/:shareId route and the /token/:token/access route, so both paths now return only the primary vet.
TypeScript compilation is clean (tsc --noEmit produced no output).
